_publications._publicationTitle: Neural Crest-Specific TSC1 Deletion in Mice Leads to Sclerotic Craniofacial Bone Lesion.

_contextSnippet: P0 promoter (P0-Cre), which targets neural crest cells and expresses Cre in approximately 30% of neural crest-derived nerve cells...the staining pattern was very sporadic
details: P0-Cre expresses in approximately 30% of neural crest-derived nerve cells with sporadic recombination pattern in neural crest-derived bones
